moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The final matches of The Championships, Wimbledon 2026, conclude this weekend at the All England Club, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals on Saturday and Sunday respectively.

angles.name: Centre Court Showdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The Wimbledon finals are here, who will lift the trophy on Centre Court this weekend?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Serving up some serious tennis and plenty of strawberries and cream! It's the final weekend at Wimbledon. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: London's Tennis Fever
angles.copy: London is buzzing with tennis fever as Wimbledon reaches its thrilling conclusion. Who's your pick for the champions?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship officially begins its tournament days from Thursday, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, following practice days starting Sunday.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Stage
angles.copy: Fore! The Open Championship tees off proper on Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who will conquer the links and lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: The world's best golfers descend on Royal Birkdale this week for The Open. Get ready for some classic links drama!

angles.name: Practice Days Underway
angles.copy: The build-up to The Open is in full swing with practice days already underway at Royal Birkdale. The main event starts Thursday!

moments.title: Nations Championship Rugby: Round Two
moments.blurb: Today marks Round Two of the Nations Championship Rugby tournament, with key matches being played across the globe.

angles.name: Rugby Action Today
angles.copy: It's Round Two of the Nations Championship Rugby! Who are you backing to dominate the pitch today?

angles.name: International Rugby Showdown
angles.copy: The international rugby action continues with Round Two of the Nations Championship. Expect big hits and thrilling tries!

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a highlight of the 2026 athletics season, takes place at the London Stadium on July 18th, featuring world-class athletes.

angles.name: Track & Field Stars
angles.copy: Get ready for some incredible track and field action! The London Athletics Meet is next Saturday at the London Stadium, with global stars competing.

angles.name: Countdown to Athletics
angles.copy: Just one week until the London Athletics Meet! Who are you hoping to see break records at the London Stadium?

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed Music Line-up
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed concludes today, having featured a star-studded music line-up including David Guetta, Richard Ashcroft, Chase & Status, and James Arthur across the weekend.

angles.name: Goodwood's Grand Finale
angles.copy: The Goodwood Festival of Speed wraps up today, and it wasn't just about the cars! Who caught the incredible music acts like David Guetta and Richard Ashcroft?

angles.name: Weekend of Speed & Sound
angles.copy: From high-octane racing to headline music acts, Goodwood Festival of Speed had it all this weekend. What was your highlight?

moments.title: Love Island UK Summer 2026 Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1st, 2026, continues to air nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Villa Drama Unfolding
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! What's got everyone talking from last night's episode?

angles.name: Who's Coupled Up?
angles.copy: Love Island UK is well underway! Are your favourite islanders still coupled up, or has a bombshell shaken things up?

angles.name: Your Summer Obsession
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island? We are too! Tune in tonight for more sun, sea, and questionable decisions.

moments.title: New ITV Thriller 'The Dark' Premieres
moments.blurb: The new gripping serial killer drama 'The Dark', set in the Scottish Highlands and starring Laura Donnelly and Mark Rowley, premieres on ITV and ITVX this Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: New Sunday Night Thriller
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The new ITV thriller 'The Dark' kicks off this Sunday. Get ready for a chilling cat-and-mouse chase in the Scottish Highlands.

angles.name: Scottish Drama Alert
angles.copy: A gripping new serial killer drama 'The Dark' premieres on ITV this Sunday, set against the stunning backdrop of the Scottish Highlands. Don't miss it!

angles.name: Prepare for Chills
angles.copy: If you love a good crime drama, 'The Dark' is your next must-watch. Premieres on ITV this Sunday – prepare for some serious chills!

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the quirky new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', where she plays an eldercare robot named Linda, set to premiere this July, with some sources indicating July 17th.

angles.name: New Comedy Alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back on our screens in the new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', playing a socially awkward robot. Expect big laughs from Friday!

angles.name: Diane Morgan's Latest
angles.copy: If you're a fan of Diane Morgan's unique humour, her new show 'Ann Droid' is coming to BBC One and iPlayer this Friday. Get ready!

angles.name: Futuristic Fun
angles.copy: A grieving widow and a second-hand robot... sounds like the perfect recipe for a quirky new comedy! 'Ann Droid' arrives on BBC this week.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: A prolonged spell of hot weather is continuing across parts of the UK, with temperatures in the mid-30s expected in England and Wales, and amber/yellow heat health alerts in place until at least Sunday.

angles.name: Stay Hydrated!
angles.copy: The heatwave continues across the UK this weekend! Remember to stay hydrated and look out for vulnerable people. Temperatures are still soaring!

angles.name: Scorching Weekend Ahead
angles.copy: Another scorching weekend is upon us! Temperatures remain high across England and Wales. How are you keeping cool?

angles.name: South West Heat
angles.copy: Devon, the heat is on! Temperatures are set to remain very high across the South West this weekend. Stay safe in the sun!

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Approaching
moments.blurb: With July well underway, many schools across the UK are preparing for the start of the summer holidays, with some starting from mid-July and most by the end of the month.

angles.name: Summer Break Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to the school summer holidays is officially on for many! Parents, what are your plans for keeping the kids entertained?

angles.name: School's Out Soon!
angles.copy: For many, school's out for summer very soon! Time to start planning those family adventures and making the most of the long break.

angles.name: Welsh School Holidays
angles.copy: The summer holidays are just around the corner for schools across Wales! What local gems will you be visiting with the family?

moments.title: Richie Sambora is 67 Today
moments.blurb: Bon Jovi's legendary former guitarist and co-songwriter, Richie Sambora, turns 67 today, July 11th. He was born in 1959.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Richie
angles.copy: Sending massive birthday wishes to the incredible Richie Sambora, who turns 67 today! What's your favourite Bon Jovi track featuring his iconic guitar work?

angles.name: Rock Legend at 67
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to rock legend Richie Sambora! The man behind some of Bon Jovi's biggest riffs. Celebrate with his greatest hits!

moments.title: Suzanne Vega is 67 Today
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday today, July 11th. She was born in 1959.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Suzanne
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the distinctive voice of Suzanne Vega! What's your favourite track from the 'Luka' singer?

angles.name: Folk-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of folk-pop icon Suzanne Vega, who turns 67 today! Timeless songs for a timeless artist.

moments.title: Chris Cross (Ultravox) is 74 on Tuesday
moments.blurb: Chris Cross, the bassist and co-founder of the iconic New Wave band Ultravox, will celebrate his 74th birthday on Tuesday, July 14th. He was born in 1952.

angles.name: Ultravox Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 74th Birthday to Chris Cross of Ultravox this Tuesday! Get ready to turn up those classic synth-pop anthems.

angles.name: 80s Icon Celebrates
angles.copy: He helped define the sound of the 80s! Chris Cross from Ultravox celebrates his 74th birthday on July 14th. What's your favourite Ultravox hit?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt is 80 on Wednesday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, a versatile artist spanning rock, country, and pop, turns 80 on Wednesday, July 15th. She was born in 1946.

angles.name: Happy 80th Linda!
angles.copy: A huge Happy 80th Birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! Celebrate her incredible career with some of her timeless tracks.

angles.name: Music Icon at 80
angles.copy: From rock to country, Linda Ronstadt has done it all. She turns 80 this Wednesday – what's your favourite song from her amazing catalogue?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland (The Police) is 74 on Thursday
moments.blurb: The innovative drummer and co-founder of The Police, Stewart Copeland, will celebrate his 74th birthday on Thursday, July 16th. He was born in 1952.

angles.name: Drumming Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the brilliant Stewart Copeland of The Police this Thursday! Get ready to groove to those iconic beats.

angles.name: The Police's Powerhouse
angles.copy: Celebrate Stewart Copeland's 74th birthday this week! His drumming with The Police is legendary. What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Luke Bryan is 50 on Friday
moments.blurb: American country superstar Luke Bryan, known for hits like 'Country Girl (Shake It for Me)', will celebrate his 50th birthday on Friday, July 17th. He was born in 1976.

angles.name: Country Star's Big 5-0
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to country music sensation Luke Bryan this Friday! What's your favourite song from the 'American Idol' judge?

angles.name: Celebrating Luke Bryan
angles.copy: It's a big birthday for Luke Bryan this week as he turns 50! Get your country playlist ready to celebrate.

moments.title: M.I.A. is 51 on Saturday
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer M.I.A., known for her experimental sound and global hits like 'Paper Planes', turns 51 on Saturday, July 18th. She was born in 1975.

angles.name: Happy Birthday M.I.A.!
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the boundary-pushing artist M.I.A., who turns 51 this Saturday! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Celebrating a Trailblazer
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible M.I.A. this weekend! An artist who consistently pushes musical boundaries. Tune in for her hits!

moments.title: The Rolling Stones Release 'Foreign Tongues'
moments.blurb: The legendary Rolling Stones released their new album, 'Foreign Tongues', yesterday, July 10th, continuing their prolific career.

angles.name: New Stones Album
angles.copy: They're still rolling! The Rolling Stones dropped their new album 'Foreign Tongues' yesterday. Have you had a listen yet?

angles.name: Timeless Rockers
angles.copy: New music from rock legends The Rolling Stones! 'Foreign Tongues' is out now. What are your first impressions?

moments.title: Kelela Drops 'new avatar'
moments.blurb: Critically acclaimed R&B/electronic artist Kelela released her new album, 'new avatar', yesterday, July 10th.

angles.name: Kelela's Latest
angles.copy: Kelela's highly anticipated new album 'new avatar' is out now! Dive into her unique R&B and electronic sound.

angles.name: New Music Dive
angles.copy: If you're looking for something fresh, Kelela's 'new avatar' dropped yesterday. Stream it now and let us know what you think!

moments.title: Mary in the Junkyard Debut Album
moments.blurb: London trio Mary in the Junkyard, generating significant buzz, released their debut album 'Role Model Hermit' yesterday, July 10th.

angles.name: Buzz Band's Debut
angles.copy: The buzz band Mary in the Junkyard just dropped their debut album 'Role Model Hermit' yesterday! Get it on your radar.

angles.name: New Indie Sounds
angles.copy: Looking for new indie rock? London's Mary in the Junkyard's debut album 'Role Model Hermit' is out now and getting a lot of attention.

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Build-Up
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games are just around the corner, set to run from July 23rd to August 2nd, with over 3,000 athletes competing across various sports.

angles.name: Commonwealth Games Countdown
angles.copy: The excitement is building for the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games! Just under two weeks until the opening ceremony. Who's ready for some world-class sport?

angles.name: Glasgow Gets Ready
angles.copy: Glasgow is gearing up to host the Commonwealth Games! Get ready to cheer on athletes from across the Commonwealth starting July 23rd.

angles.name: Sporting Spectacle Soon
angles.copy: A major sporting spectacle is heading to the UK! The Commonwealth Games in Glasgow begin soon. Start planning your viewing schedule!
